refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control algorithm effectiveness, and optimization results against the target energy_per_ton ≤ E_target.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms for energy management.
DP3: Use data analytics and feedback loops for operational optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to address measurement, control, and optimization respectively.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between DP1 and DP3
Control algorithm (DP2) depends on measurement accuracy (DP1)
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and manageable via well-defined telemetry interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable telemetry network for data exchange.
Risk of sensor inaccuracies impacting control and optimization.
Risk of control algorithm complexity affecting real-time performance.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing telemetry and control to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including energy measurement, control algorithms, and optimization analytics.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for transmitting energy and operational data between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands from Teleoperation module to adjust vehicle behavior.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts to Safety Services if energy usage indicates unsafe conditions.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and external modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of energy efficiency functions; low diffusion due to centralized analytics.
Contains sensors and control actuators but limited analytics capability.
Primarily tasking interface; minimal containment of energy efficiency logic.
Receives alerts but does not contain energy efficiency functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing energy efficiency logic and analytics in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Dependency on reliable network links for telemetry and tasking.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting analytics and control into submodules within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are clearly refined and mapped to logical DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralization in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity and risk of single point of failure.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module for energy efficiency functions.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data validation and operational testing within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution with defined interfaces to Vehicle, Teleoperation, and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Consider modular decomposition within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity.
Plan for redundancy or failover to mitigate single point of failure risk.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and allocation meets requirements with acceptable risks; no further immediate refinement needed.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: To consider modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and diffusion risks.

assumptions: Telemetry network is reliable and secure.
Sensors provide accurate and timely data.
open_risks: Complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module.
Potential latency in telemetry affecting control responsiveness.
evidence_needed: System integration test results validating energy efficiency targets.
